title: russelia lilacina
intro: Russelia lilacina, also known as the Queen of the Night or Coral Fountain, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, known for its vibrant red, pink, and white flowers that bloom in the evening and fade by morning. The medicinal properties of Russelia lilacina include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Russelia lilacina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
